adr_entry:
No ADR required.

Rationale: US-015 adds a `drawThree` pure function to the existing `src/domain/drawRandom.ts` (reusing `drawOne` internally), a new `DrawThreeKeepOne` component in `src/features/play/`, a CSS Module for styling, and a new `#/play/draw-three` route in App.tsx. All additions follow established conventions — pure domain logic in `src/domain/`, feature components in `src/features/play/`, CSS Modules per ADR-004, and the custom hash router per ADR-017. No new dependencies, architectural patterns, or module boundaries are introduced.

The routing decision about whether `#/play` becomes a menu page or retains SingleDraw as default (with a sub-nav to Draw Three Keep One) is a UX-level decision within the existing hash router framework, not an architectural change — it requires no new routing capabilities and stays within ADR-017's established pattern. The plan correctly registers the new route in App.tsx's existing switch and keeps Nav.tsx using standard anchor tags with hash hrefs. Both existing ADRs (ADR-004 shell layout, ADR-017 hash router) are unaffected.
